status: NEVER FLASHED TO HARDWARE — built and verified against DroidNet's flasher logic only. Bench-test before field use.
flash_via: DroidNet web UI -> Flash tab (upload file, connect board over USB).
board: PSI Pro (Neil Hutchison) — SparkFun Pro Micro, ATmega32U4 @16MHz

droidnet_flash.note: Serial-only build (I2C intake disabled). DroidNet does the 1200-baud Pro-Micro bootloader reset automatically. Board auto-detected from MCU signature.
Adds upstream I2C/JawaLite intake. FastLED render is SREG-masked so the TWI ISR can't re-enter (see fork README). Only flash if you drive the PSI over I2C.
